name: Duke Scaramouche
description:
An art disease that slowly kills you.

Loving art had a price– one not many people were willing to pay. If someone engages in any form of art the risks of getting sick are extremely high. However not even that could stop you from doing what you love.

These were called art disease. There are many types of them but there's a particular one that proves to be incredibly dangerous– one that you developed not too long ago.

In exchange for making art come to life temporarily, your lifespan gets reduced.
creator: Aeelym_
